title: KLxier PVP
description: A new texture pack that reinvents the original new textures.
body:
# KLxier PVP Texture Pack
---
### KLxier PVP Fix Packs Can Find Here (If you use 1.9 - 1.20.1 Version): 
- 1.9+(Fixed Player Inventory & Brewing Stand GUI): [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.9fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.9fix)
- 1.11+(Fixed Hrose/Llama/Mule GUI): [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.11fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.11fix)
- 1.18+(Fixed Player Inventory GUI): [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.18fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.18fix)
- 1.19.3+(Fixed Player Creative Inventory TAB): [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.19.3fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.19.3fix)
- 1.20+(Fixed Title & Smithing Table GUI): [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.20fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/klpvp-1.20fix)

## KLxier PVP Bedrock Edition Can Find Here: [https://github.com/KLxier/KLxier-PVP-Texture-Pack-for-History-BEVersion](https://github.com/KLxier/KLxier-PVP-Texture-Pack-for-History-BEVersion)
---
A new texture pack that reinvents the original new textures.
